title: Eu Shipping Ban To Be The Deciding Factor For Russia Volumes And Tanker Fates
section_path: Eu Shipping Ban To Be The Deciding Factor For Russia Volumes And Tanker Fates
section_path_text: Eu Shipping Ban To Be The Deciding Factor For Russia Volumes And Tanker Fates
summary:
Main
By Ioannis Papadimitriou
With the EU ban on Russian crude and products just round the corner, the unwinding of the Russian-European oil interdependency is underway. For crude barrels this has been the case for quite a while, with Europe managing to reduce its Russian crude purchases significantly. Yet for clean products (CPP) the change in trade patterns has just commenced.
